name: alterlab-treatment-plans
description: Generates concise (3-4 page), focused medical treatment plans in LaTeX/PDF format across all clinical specialties — general medical treatment, rehabilitation therapy, mental health care, chronic disease management, perioperative care, and pain management — using SMART goal frameworks, evidence-based interventions with minimal citations, HIPAA compliance, and professional formatting. author: AlterLab-IEU
